# First-Time-Use Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize first-time-use physical configuration enum mapping and facade-operation readiness before broader shared ownership. `first-time-use-readiness.json` is consumed by `FirstTimeUseModelsCommonPolicyTest.kt`, `PolarFirstTimeUseConfigTest.kt`, `BDBleApiImplTest.kt`, and `PolarBleApiImplTests.swift` to keep Android, iOS, and shared coverage aligned while protobuf construction, sync sequencing implementation, BLE transport/write execution, SwiftPM/watchOS fallback, validation ranges, and public error translation stay platform-owned.
